creator: chrispetso@cablered.net.mx
text:
This issue is also present in FreeBSD 7-Stable 32bit but the issue takes
longer to happen. My pc freezes hard in 32bit so theres no way to get any
other info and last shows the freeze as a crash. I like the Habu due to
it's speed not much of the keyboard shortcuts, they should have a way to
turn those off so it acts as just a mouse and not a keyboard/mouse maybe
that would fix the issue? Mouse works fine in Console but act's up in X. I
have tried to use moused, no moused, Type Auto in Xorg.conf no fix. Very
few decent mice are all USB so proper USB support is needed, thats the
only issue I have atm.

Any issue or other info please email me here.
